# Stanley Tejakusuma

> Personal site of Stanley Tejakusuma. Data and AI engineer across blockchain and analytics: pipelines, agents, and trading systems. Open to data · quant · ai/ml roles.

## Pages

- [Home](https://stanleytejakusuma.com/): tabbed one-pager with about, experience, projects, and the musings research archive
- [Resume](https://stanleytejakusuma.com/resume/): printable resume with full work history and contact links
- [Musings archive](https://stanleytejakusuma.com/#musings): 65 crypto and data research write-ups (2021-2024); 61 served at /musings/<slug>/, 4 as external link-outs
- [RSS feed](https://stanleytejakusuma.com/rss.xml): every musing with dates and links
- [Sitemap](https://stanleytejakusuma.com/sitemap-index.xml)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/stanleytejakusuma): open-source projects

## AI projects

- atlas: LLM fine-tuning experiments (QLoRA, SFT then DPO on an open-weights 14B model) with a 703-case eval harness and judge ensemble
- Kairos: self-hosted agentic RAG gateway with multi-source ingestion, a tool registry, scheduled agents, and human-approval guardrails
- knowledge-graph: personal knowledge graph of around 6,000 nodes and 21,000 embedding-similarity edges; training corpus for atlas
- trading-journal: LLM pipeline that captures trades and classifies trading psychology over each trade's event timeline
- ring-mcp: open-source MCP server that exposes Oura Ring data as agent tools
